LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT PACIFIC SPECIALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 3, 2015. IN HIS OPPOSITION, PLAINTIFF STATES THAT HE WISHES TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO AMEND HIS COMPLAINT ONCE AS A MATTER OF COURSE. (CCP SEC. 472.) IN THE INTEREST OF JUDICIAL ECONOMY, THE HEARING IS CONTINUED TO PERMIT PLAINTIFF TO FILE THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. IF THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOT FILED BY THE APRIL 3, 2015 HEARING, THE COURT WILL REACH THE MERITS OF THE DEMURRER. JUDGE : ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Fifth Cause Of Action
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-29-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DAWN PRINCE'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is taken Off Calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2015 Continued To Nov-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-03-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DAWN PRINCE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken off calendar. An amended complaint has been filed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2015 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Continued To Apr-03-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT PACIFIC SPECIALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to April 3, 2015. In his opposition, Plaintiff states that he wishes to file an amended complaint. Plaintiff is entitled to amend his complaint once as a matter of course. (CCP sec. 472.) In the interest of judicial economy, the hearing is continued to permit Plaintiff to file the amended complaint. If the amended complaint is not filed by the April 3, 2015 hearing, the Court will reach the merits of the demurrer. Judge : Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Continued To May-20-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Continued To Mar-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PACIFIC SPECIALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to March 2, 2015, on the court's motion. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
